title: huperzia urbanii
intro: Huperzia urbanii, also known as Urban's liverwort, is a species of plant that belongs to the Huperziaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its content of huperzine A, a substance that has been shown to have neuroprotective and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Huperzia urbanii include potential cognitive enhancement, improved memory, and protection against neurodegenerative diseases such as Alzheimer's and Parkinson's. In herbal preparations, Huperzia urbanii is often used in traditional Chinese medicine and is available in various forms, including capsules, tablets, and extracts, although its use should be under the guidance of a healthcare professional due to potential side effects.
